nasb.text: These were heads of the fathers’ households according to their generations, chief men who lived in Jerusalem.

esv.text: These were the heads of fathers’ houses, according to their generations, chief men. These lived in Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 以上這些人照著家譜都是他們家族的首領，是住在耶路撒冷的首領。

ccb.text: 按家谱记载，以上这些人都是族长，住在耶路撒冷。
